{{Dialogue|Vader|Prepare the boarding party and set your weapons for stun.|Piett|Yes, my lord. Lieutenant.|Cecius|Yes, sir.|attr=Admiral Firmus Piett orders Cecius to carry out Darth Vader's commands|src=<ref name="ESB" />}}
'''Cecius''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vogel 7]] and formerly of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], Cecius served as a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] aboard [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']]. As a specialist in boarding tactics and the seizing of enemy [[Starship/Legends|starships]], Cecius was given command of the capture of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the crew of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], during their [[Occupation of Bespin|escape]] from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], though his duties were nullified when the Rebel ship unexpectedly escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Biography==
Cecius was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="ESB" /> A native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vogel 7]] and former member of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], Cecius, a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] by<ref name="Cloud City" /> [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> was assigned aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]],<ref name="ESB" /> as a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Cecius served under the command of [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]].<ref name="ESB" />

His<ref name="CSWE" /> specialized duties aboard the ''Executor'' included boarding tactics and the seizure of enemy [[Starship/Legends|starships]].<ref name="Cloud City" /> When the ''Executor'' attempted to intercept [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the crew of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], during their escape from [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] amidst its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Occupation of Bespin|subjugation]] in<ref name="ESB" /> 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Cecius was stationed aboard the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer's]] bridge. After Vader ordered Piett to ready the ''Executor''{{'s}} boarding party with weapons set to [[Stun/Legends|stun]] in preparation for the capture of the ''Millennium Falcon''{{'s}} crew, the responsibility fell to Cecius to carry out the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord's]] command vicariously. However, before Cecius's boarding party could take control of the fugitive Rebel ship, the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="ESB" />

==Personality and traits==
Cecius, a [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="ESB" /> specialized in boarding tactics and taking control of enemy vessels, of which his duties consisted during his [[Time/Legends|time]] aboard [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader's flagship, a testament to his [[Standard day/Legends|days]] in the Imperial infantry. As of his service aboard the ''Executor'' in<ref name="Cloud City" /> 3 ABY,<ref name="Date" /> Cecius had not had a date in [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="Cloud City" /> He had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin.<ref name="ESB" />

==Equipment==
Lieutenant Cecius wore the standard-issue [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]] during his service aboard the ''Executor''{{'s}} bridge in<ref name="ESB" /> 3 ABY.<ref name="Date" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cecius first appeared in the film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="ESB" /> His minor appearance and single spoken line therein is unique to movie and not included in the film's [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|novelization]].<ref name="ESB novel">[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back'' novelization]]</ref> Note that the actor's on-screen positioning during his scene leaves him mostly cut off from view unless watching the film in widescreen format.<ref name="ESB" />

The Cecius character was first identified by name and provided a brief backstory on the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/CloudCity-Dark/large/lieutenantcecius.gif "Lieutenant Cecius" card] as part of the [[November]] [[1997]] ''[[Cloud City Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Cloud City" />
